PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('profile')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('test')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiErrorElement:'String' unexpected
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
      PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('foo')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/etc/foo'')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('bar')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('12')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiComment(COMMENT)('# chosen by random dice roll')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Optional')
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Struct')
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
        PsiElement(NAME)('a')
      PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Hash')
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(REGEX)('/\d+\.\d+\.\d+/')
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
        PsiElement(NAME)('b')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
      PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('baz')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(UNDEF)('undef')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('file')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('foo')
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
            PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
                PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('present')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('content')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('bar')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                  PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n  ')
      PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
        PsiElement(IF)('if')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('baz')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement({)('{')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
            PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
              PsiPuppetHashArrayAccessesImpl(HASH_ARRAY_ACCESSES)
                Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                  PsiElement($)('$')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('baz')
                PsiPuppetHashArrayIndexImpl(HASH_ARRAY_INDEX)
                  PsiElement([)('[')
                  PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                    PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''a'')
                  PsiElement(])(']')
              PsiErrorElement:'!=', '!~', '%', '*', '+', '-', '/', <, <<, <=, '==', '=~', '>', '>=', '>>', '[', and, in or or expected, got '.'
                PsiElement(.)('.')
            PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('each')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiErrorElement:'|' unexpected
              PsiElement(|)('|')
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('key')
            PsiErrorElement:';', <expression relation> or NAME expected, got ','
              PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('value')
              PsiElement(|)('|')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
              PsiElement(NAME)('package')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('key')
              PsiElement(:)(':')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n        ')
              PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
            PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
              PsiWhiteSpace('   ')
              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('value')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n        ')
              PsiElement(NAME)('provider')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('baz')
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''b'')
            PsiElement(])(']')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
            PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
  PsiErrorElement:Unknown tokens
    PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiErrorElement:Unknown tokens
    PsiElement(})('}')
